div.h3: Scalable Weakly-consistent Infection-style Process Group Membership Protocol

p.em: One round: O(1) bandwidth per node regardless of cluster size

tr.td: Wait time for direct probe response
Number of intermediary nodes for PingReq

ul.li: O(1) per node: Independent of total cluster size N.
Packet Size: ~512 bytes (including IP/UDP headers + 10 gossip items).
